title: Packet 071 Through Packet 073 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish Packet 071 closeout authority, Packet 072 branch decision authority, Packet 073 decomposition planning authority, and Packet 074 draft authority through the parent-root boundary, then restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity before any later one-worker validation-surface decomposition execution packet.
dependency_note: Packet 072 selected Branch D as planning-only; Packet 073 defined a future one-worker, test-only validation-surface decomposition slice. Packet 074 publishes that authority before any later execution packet can touch the browser-smoke surface.
excluded_drift: Packet 074 local closeout authority drift after publication
any unrelated authority drift outside Packet 071 through Packet 073 closure surfaces
validation_steps: Confirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 071 closeout authority, Packet 072 decision authority, Packet 073 planning authority, Packet 074 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run JSON parse checks and `git diff --cached --check` before committing.
Confirm no source, package, or lockfile paths are staged.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively to the published commit and confirm status count 0.
preserved_boundaries: Authority publication is not validation-surface decomposition execution authority by itself.
No source/test execution opens in Packet 074.
No simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution opens in Packet 074.
No second mutation worker opens in Packet 074.
Installs and package-manager activation/download remain closed.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, source/test execution, validation-surface decomposition execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, second-worker execution, slice widening, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
